# DMCA Takedown Notice Template

> 本模板用于向 GitHub 或其他平台提交 DMCA 侵权通知。
> 使用时请根据实际情况填写 `[方括号]` 中的内容。

---

## DMCA Takedown Notice

**Date:** [日期]

**To:** GitHub, Inc. / [平台名称]
DMCA Agent
88 Colin P Kelly Jr St
San Francisco, CA 94107

---

### 1. Contact Information

- **Name:** Basion Wang
- **Email:** basionwang@gmail.com
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/basionwang-bot
- **Project:** HermesPet (https://github.com/basionwang-bot/HermesPet)

### 2. Identification of Copyrighted Work

The copyrighted work is **HermesPet**, an open-source macOS AI desktop companion application.

- **Official Repository:** https://github.com/basionwang-bot/HermesPet
- **License:** Apache License 2.0
- **Official Website:** https://hermespet.cc
- **First Published:** 2024
- **Copyright Holder:** Basion Wang

### 3. Identification of Infringing Material

The following material infringes on my copyright:

- **URL(s):** [侵权链接]
- **Description:** [侵权行为描述]
- **Specific files/content:** [具体侵权的文件或内容]

### 4. Nature of Infringement

[选择适用的项目]

- [ ] The repository copies substantial portions of HermesPet's source code without attribution
- [ ] The repository removes or alters copyright notices required by Apache 2.0
- [ ] The repository falsely claims original authorship of HermesPet code
- [ ] The repository uses the "HermesPet" trademark without authorization
- [ ] The repository distributes modified versions without stating changes (Apache 2.0 Section 4)

### 5. Good Faith Statement

I have a good faith belief that use of the copyrighted materials described above on the infringing web pages is not authorized by the copyright owner, or its agent, or the law.

### 6. Accuracy Statement

I swear, under penalty of perjury, that the information in this notification is accurate and that I am the copyright owner, or am authorized to act on behalf of the owner, of an exclusive right that is allegedly infringed.

### 7. Signature

**Electronic Signature:** Basion Wang
**Date:** [日期]

---

## 使用说明

1. 复制本模板
2. 填写 `[方括号]` 中的内容
3. 发送至对应平台的 DMCA 处理邮箱：
   - **GitHub:** copyright@github.com
   - **Gitee:** dmca@gitee.com
   - **App Store:** https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/appstorenotices/
4. 保留发送记录作为证据

## 参考资源

- [GitHub DMCA Policy](https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/content-removal-policies/dmca-takedown-policy)
- [Apache 2.0 License FAQ](https://www.apache.org/foundation/license-faq.html)
